title: Snapshot v2
description: Persistent snapshot/manifest for a run. ADR D3: snapshot is a manifest. P0 allows legacy heavy fields (conversation/agent_io/todo_states) as optional — they will be removed in P4.

version.description: Schema major version. v2 = 2. Absent on legacy snapshots (treated as v1).

updated_at.description: Optional timestamp of last snapshot write.

completed_at.description: Set when status transitions to completed/failed/cancelled.

latest_iter_by_node.description: Map: node_id -> latest iter number. Derived from iter_index. Target (D3).

agents_snapshot.description: DAG node metadata for outline rendering.

last_seq.description: Global event_bus seq at last snapshot write. WS reconnect sync point (D5/D7).

seq_cursor.description: Legacy alias for last_seq. Renamed in P4-T05; allowed here for v1 read compat.

nodes_latest.description: Legacy (P0-P3). Merged into latest_iter_by_node in P4 (O2).

todo_states.description: Legacy (P0-P3). Removed in P4 — todo_steps live in sidecar (O1, I9).

iter_index.description: Legacy embed of iter_index inside snapshot. Sidecar iter_index.json is authoritative (D1).
